name: Claude Sonnet
description: Advanced reasoning model for complex analysis, strategy, report writing, and nuanced content generation. The go-to for tasks that need deep thinking.
best_for: Research synthesis, board reports, regulatory analysis, strategic recommendations

name: Claude Haiku
description: Fast, cost-effective model for high-volume tasks — classification, extraction, summarization, and quick Q&A at scale.
best_for: Ticket classification, document summarization, data extraction, bulk processing

name: ChatGPT (OpenAI)
description: Versatile conversational AI for brainstorming, drafting, translation, and general-purpose reasoning across teams.
best_for: Brainstorming, first drafts, translation, general Q&A, ideation sessions

name: Perplexity AI
description: AI-powered research engine that searches the web and synthesizes answers with cited sources in real-time. Ideal for market research and competitive intelligence.
best_for: Market research, competitor analysis, regulatory updates, corridor research, fact-checking

name: Elicit
description: AI research assistant that finds, summarizes, and extracts data from academic papers and reports. Built for rigorous research workflows.
best_for: Academic research, policy analysis, literature reviews, data extraction from papers

name: Tavily
description: AI search API built for agents and research pipelines. Provides structured, real-time web search with content extraction and ranking.
best_for: Automated research pipelines, real-time data gathering, news monitoring, agent-powered search

name: Gamma
description: AI-powered presentation and document builder. Generate polished decks, reports, and one-pagers from prompts or raw content in minutes.
best_for: Board decks, investor presentations, team updates, one-pagers, internal reports

name: Beautiful.ai
description: Smart presentation software with AI-driven design. Automatically formats slides with professional layouts as you add content.
best_for: Client presentations, pitch decks, quarterly reviews, training materials

name: Notion AI
description: AI writing and knowledge management built into Notion. Draft docs, summarize pages, extract action items, and manage team knowledge.
best_for: SOPs, meeting notes, project documentation, knowledge base management, wikis

name: Midjourney
description: Leading AI image generation tool for creating high-quality visuals, illustrations, and creative assets from text prompts.
best_for: Marketing visuals, social media assets, campaign imagery, brand illustrations

name: DALL-E 3
description: OpenAI's image generation model with strong prompt adherence and text rendering. Integrated into ChatGPT for seamless creative workflows.
best_for: Blog graphics, ad creatives, product mockups, social content, infographic elements

name: Runway ML
description: AI video generation and editing platform. Create videos from text/images, remove backgrounds, and apply generative effects.
best_for: Marketing videos, social media clips, product demos, animated explainers

name: HeyGen
description: AI avatar video platform for creating professional talking-head videos with AI presenters in 40+ languages. No camera needed.
best_for: Training videos, multilingual explainers, onboarding content, customer-facing videos

name: Canva AI (Magic Studio)
description: AI-powered design suite within Canva — generate images, edit photos, create presentations, and design social posts with natural language.
best_for: Social media design, email banners, quick graphics, team templates, brand assets

name: Jasper
description: AI content platform built for marketing teams. Generate on-brand copy across channels with custom brand voice and style guides.
best_for: Campaign copy, blog posts, email sequences, ad copy, landing pages

name: Copy.ai
description: AI copywriting tool with workflow automation. Generate marketing content, sales outreach, and social posts at scale.
best_for: Social media copy, product descriptions, email outreach, A/B test variants

name: Descript
description: AI-powered audio/video editor that works like a text document. Edit by editing the transcript — remove filler words, overdub, and add captions.
best_for: Podcast editing, video transcription, meeting recordings, content repurposing

name: Whisper (OpenAI)
description: State-of-the-art speech recognition supporting 90+ languages. Transcribe meetings, calls, and audio with high accuracy.
best_for: Meeting transcription, call analysis, multilingual audio, voice note processing

name: Tableau / Looker
description: Enterprise dashboarding and visualization platforms. Build interactive reports from structured data with AI-assisted insights.
best_for: KPI dashboards, financial reporting, trend analysis, executive reporting

name: Julius AI
description: AI data analyst that connects to spreadsheets, databases, and files. Ask questions in natural language and get charts, insights, and analysis.
best_for: Ad-hoc data analysis, financial modelling, CSV/Excel analysis, quick visualizations

name: Zapier
description: No-code integration platform connecting 6000+ apps. Automate data flow between tools without engineering effort.
best_for: Cross-tool automation, lead routing, data syncing, trigger-based workflows

name: Slack Workflow Automations
description: Native Slack automation for triggering workflows, posting updates, collecting data via forms, and routing notifications across teams.
best_for: Team notifications, approval workflows, status updates, daily digests, standup bots

name: ChromaDB
description: Open-source vector database for storing and querying embeddings. The backbone for building RAG pipelines and semantic search over internal documents.
best_for: RAG pipelines, semantic search, document retrieval, knowledge base Q&A

name: Python + FastAPI
description: High-performance Python web framework for building APIs and AI pipelines. The glue connecting AI models, databases, and frontends.
best_for: API development, AI pipeline orchestration, data processing, backend automation

name: LangChain
description: Framework for building LLM-powered applications with chains, agents, and retrieval. Simplifies complex multi-step AI workflows.
best_for: Multi-step AI workflows, agent chains, document Q&A, structured output parsing
